scope.summary: Implement GarmentCodeRcDecoder with panel template factories for tshirt, shirt, dress, pants, skirt, jacket, hood, sleeve garment categories, decoding up to 76 normalized f32 params into a full cm GarmentSpec
acceptance_criteria: GarmentCodeRcDecoder struct is defined in tailor-solver/src/decoder.rs with a factory registry keyed by garment_type string
GarmentSpec::from_garmentcode_rc(v, decoder) decodes a 76-float ChatGarment Tier-1 JSON payload into a valid cm GarmentSpec for all 8 required garment categories
Decoded GarmentSpec passes PANEL_CLOSURE, SEAM_EDGE_REF, MIN_PANEL_AREA, and FABRIC_RANGE fast-validation checks without modification for all 8 categories
Tier-1 decode path is wired as the first decode step in author_garment when spec.schema_id is the compact GarmentCodeRC schema id
GarmentSpec::to_garmentcode_json() round-trips through from_garmentcode_rc() and back with less than 0.5 cm deviation on panel vertex coordinates
No normalized [0,1] vertex coordinate survives into the authority tailor_garments.spec_json JSONB column
proof_targets: cargo test -p tailor-solver garmentcode_rc_decoder -- --nocapture (all 8 categories produce valid GarmentSpec)
cargo test -p tailor-solver garmentcode_roundtrip (round-trip cm deviation < 0.5 cm)
cargo test -p handshake_core tailor::model_adapter::tier1_decode_path (author_garment accepts compact input and emits TailorGarmentDraftProposed)
scope.risk_if_missed: The ChatGarment 350-token interactive dialogue path — the primary LLM-friendly authoring mode and Handshake's key differentiator over MD's GUI-only authoring — is unusable. Models must emit full explicit GarmentSpec JSON, which is 10-30x more tokens per turn and breaks the interactive self-correction loop for complex garments.

risks: Broad MT scope can hide multiple review targets.
Markdown MT lists may disagree with packet-declared active/next MT truth.
Receipt routing may target an old MT if contract identity is omitted.
minimum_controls: Exactly one primary proof target per MT unless the packet records why not.
MT identity must be stable and referenced by receipt correlation.
Generated projection drift must not wake Coder or Validator by itself.
